title: Rig Veda 7.86: Varuna's Omniscience
description: From the Rig Veda — the oldest scripture in any Indo-European language.
introduction: From the Rig Veda — the oldest scripture in any Indo-European language.

translation.text: Varuna has spread out the earth like a skin for the sun. He has put strength in horses, milk in cows, will in hearts, fire in the waters.
